title: Smoky Okonomiyaki
description: A twist on the classic Japanese dish, this smoky okonomiyaki combines savory flavors with a crispy texture.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the okonomiyaki mix and 1/2 cup of water until smooth.
Add the diced smoked salmon and shredded lettuce to the bowl and stir until combined.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the pan and swirl to coat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the okonomiyaki mixture into the pan and spread evenly.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the okonomiyaki and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is golden brown.
Serve hot with mayonnaise, sauce, sliced green onions, and sesame seeds.
